message:
fix(robot): use descriptive names for empty test case values

Fix test name generation when testing empty strings/values:
- TestGetWarningMessage: empty level now shows as "empty_level"
- TestGetSuggestion: empty alert type now shows as "empty_alert_type"

This prevents confusing empty test names in test output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
